items.question: What animal's fingerprints are so close to humans that they can confuse crime-scene analysis?
items.explanation: Koala fingerprints have ridge patterns so similar to human fingerprints that they have reportedly confused investigators.

items.question: What color is the "black box" recorder on most commercial airplanes?
items.explanation: Flight recorders are painted bright orange so they are easier to locate after an accident.

items.question: What everyday food never really spoils when stored properly?
items.explanation: Honey's low moisture and natural chemistry make it famously long-lasting, and edible ancient honey has even been found in tombs.

items.question: What is the national animal of Scotland?
items.explanation: Scotland's national animal is the unicorn, chosen for its symbolism in Celtic mythology and heraldry.

items.question: Which planet has a day longer than its year?
items.explanation: Venus rotates extremely slowly, so one full spin takes longer than one trip around the Sun.
